Issues: Lack of Originality: The image style is very generic and does not offer unique artistic value, making it difficult to establish strong intellectual property rights or high market value.
Low Commercial Appeal: The design is simple and lacks a distinct theme, compelling visual story, or specific niche that would attract a large commercial audience.
Print Quality Concerns: As a simple digital rendering, scaling and printing quality may not hold up well for high-resolution commercial use without professional refinement.
Lack of Technical Depth: The image relies on basic shapes and coloring without sophisticated composition or advanced technical skill, limiting its perceived artistic value.
